list_name: FDA List of Established Drug Names Recommended to Use Tall Man Lettering
format: HTML (web page only; no downloadable file)
machine_readable_notes: The FDA page is an HTML table and can be scraped. Used as a cross-check against the manually transcribed CSV. The cross-check helper at tools/build-lists/crosscheck/fda-crosscheck.js fetches and parses the live page.
licence_notes: No restrictions on reproduction or use.
monitoring: Check after any Name Differentiation Project announcement. Page metadata showed most recent update on 12 June 2026.
notes: The FDA list covers FDA-approved generic drug name pairs only where FDA has formally requested voluntary label revisions from manufacturers. It is a strict subset of the ISMP combined document; TML forms are identical for any pair appearing in both. As of June 2026 the list contains 23 unique pairs/groups covering ~45 individual drug names. No archived file: the US Government does not provide a downloadable version; the cross-check helper fetches the live page.
